question_text: Which of the following best describes a comet?

options.label: A
options.text: A large ball of rock and metal that orbits the Sun

options.label: B
options.text: A small icy body that orbits the Sun and develops a tail when it gets close to the Sun

options.label: C
options.text: A small object in the asteroid belt between Mars and Jupiter

options.label: D
options.text: A natural satellite that orbits a planet

explanation: Comets are icy bodies from the outer solar system that develop a bright tail of gas and dust when they approach the Sun. This tail is what makes them visible and distinctive from other solar system objects.
